sent.title: Check your email
sent.body: We have sent a password reset link to <1>{{email}}</1>. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.

done.title: Password reset successfully
done.body: Your password has been reset. You may now sign in with your new credentials.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.resetFailed: We could not process your request. Please try again.
errors.tfaExpired: Your verification code has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.userNotFound: We could not find an account for that email.
errors.alreadyRegistered: An account already exists for that email.
errors.syncFailed: We could not complete your request. Please try again.
